case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, VS. BRENDAN P KILSHAW ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-23-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
